title: Press Release - Panacea Biotec is proud to announce the inclusion of EmulsiPan adjuvant in the CEPI Adjuvant Library and its foray into commercialisation of its indigenously developed adjuvants
body: Press Release - Panacea Biotec is proud to announce the inclusion of EmulsiPan adjuvant in the CEPI Adjuvant Library and its foray into commercialisation of its indigenously developed adjuvants English Global Press Release - Panacea Biotec is proud to announce the inclusion of EmulsiPan adjuvant in the CEPI Adjuvant Library and its foray into commercialisation of its indigenously developed adjuvants June 3, 2025 3rd June 2025 New Delhi Panacea Biotec is proud to announce the inclusion of EmulsiPan adjuvant in the CEPI Adjuvant Library and its foray into commercialisation of its indigenously developed adjuvants Panacea Biotec Limited is proud to announce the listing of EmulsiPan in the CEPI (Coalition for Epidemic Preparedness Innovations) Library of adjuvants to support the scientific community in advancing vaccine and biotherapeutic development. EmulsiPan has been recognized for its potential in enhancing the efficacy and dose-sparing effects. EmulsiPan is an oil-in-water emulsion adjuvant and is produced by nano-emulsification of squalene along with surfactants and buffers. Squalene is a naturally occurring biodegradable and biocompatible triterpene hydrocarbon found in many plants as well as in humans. EmulsiPan is a ready-to-use sterile emulsion, supplied in a 10 mL USP Type I glass vial for research purposes. It is designed for storage at 2-8°C and maintains stability for over 2-years under recommended conditions. On the occasion, the Chairman and Managing Director, Panacea Biotec, Dr. Rajesh Jain said, “ It is with great pride that we announce the availability of EmulsiPan, a ready-to-use dose-sparing adjuvant designed to enhance vaccine efficacy and support global public health initiatives. Such investments showcase our commitment to research and development investments that provide us the edge to not just meet ongoing challenges but also create a future-ready company that is prepared for every possibility and opportunity. ” The global market for adjuvants is expected to reach over $4.8 billion [1] by 2028 with applications across vaccines and biological therapies including oncology. Oil-in-water emulsion adjuvants like EmulsiPan are used in multiple commercial vaccines like the flu vaccines. EmulsiPan’s open access and affordability signal Panacea Biotec’s entry into commercialisation of adjuvants. The increasing prevalence of communicable diseases and the need for effective vaccines are driving the demand for oil-in-water emulsions. It is also used in animal vaccines. EmulsiPan has been utilized in several high-impact preclinical studies and collaborative research programs, demonstrating its versatility and potential to enhance vaccine efficacy. Notably, it has been employed in non-human primate (NHP) challenge studies for Sarbecoronavirus candidate vaccine development at California Institute of Technology ______________________ [1] DelveInsight. 2025. Link . (Caltech), and in the Betacoronavirus candidate vaccine development program in collaboration with BRIC-Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) and funded by CEPI. These collaborations highlight EmulsiPan as a reliable and adaptable adjuvant platform across a diverse range of vaccine development efforts. EmulsiPan was developed in 2009 and commercialised as part of PandyFlu (Panacea Biotec’s H1N1 vaccine). EmulsiPan has since evolved into a trusted platform adjuvant, enabling vaccine development across multiple disease areas. At that time, Panacea Biotec successfully developed the adjuvant, established a cGMP manufacturing facility, developed the vaccine, including the adjuvant, on a fast track basis to respond to the pandemic situation. EmulsiPan does not require any licensing fees - ensuring affordability and providing open access for vaccine developers. Research institutes and companies that are looking for adjuvants can now contact us for commercial or research programs. Inclusion in the prestigious CEPI Adjuvant Library is testimony that EmulsiPan has undergone rigorous review and meets the necessary standards for supporting human vaccine development, increasing its credibility within the scientific and pharmaceutical communities. With its user-friendly formulation, regulatory preparedness, and robust scientific validation, EmulsiPan® stands as a catalyst for advancing global vaccine innovation. By removing access barriers and providing a stable, cGMP manufacturing, ready-to-use formulation, Panacea Biotec reaffirms its dedication to equitable healthcare and strengthened global preparedness against pandemics. About Panacea Biotec Panacea Biotec is an innovation-led integrated biopharmaceutical group committed to the discovery, development, and commercialization of high-quality pharmaceuticals, vaccines, nutrition, and wellness products. We integrate cutting-edge science with our mission to address unmet medical needs through affordable solutions. Panacea Biotec has filed over 1,500 patents globally. Panacea Biotec is a recipient of Thomson Reuters Top 50 Innovator of the Year awards in 2015 and 2016. Panacea Biotec has played a vital role in Polio eradication in India by delivering >10 billion doses of oral polio vaccines. Anticipating stagnancy in Polio cases in early 2000s, Panacea Biotec developed and launched the world’s first monovalent and bivalent oral polio vaccines that finally helped India to reach zero cases in 2011. Our journey has been marked by Polio eradication leading to a bigger impact across infectious diseases. Panacea Biotec is the first company to have developed a fully liquid Pentavalent vaccine (DTwP+HepB+Hib) EasyFive-TT in 2005. Panacea Biotec is also the first company to have introduced the World’s first fully-liquid wP-IPV based Hexavalent vaccine, EasySix (DTwP+HepB+Hib+IPV) in 2017. We have supplied >200 million doses of innovative fully-liquid combination vaccines across the world. Our other key vaccines in the portfolio are EasyFour-TT (DTwP+Hib), EasyFour®-Pol (DTwP+IPV), Bivalent oral polio vaccine (type-1 and type-3) and thiomersal-free Td (tetanus reduced diphtheria). Our pipeline products include NucoVac-11 (Pneumococcal Conjugate Vaccine) and DengiALL (Recombinant Tetravalent Dengue Candidate Vaccine). Our Nutritional products include ChilRun Full, ChilRun Full No Sucrose, and ChilRun 7+ that support a child's total growth and development requirements. We have launched NikoMom, to meet the needs of mothers and newborn babies through natural, safe, and non-toxic products. Under this brand, we have launched NikoMom baby diapers and NikoMom 99.9% water based wet wipes. We have commercialised our first NCE under the brand name Sitcom (euphorbia prostate extract) for the treatment of Piles as per ICH guidelines and nanotechnology based world’s first bioequivalent generic, PacliAll (to generic to Abraxane). We have a robust R&D pipeline including high-barrier generics, leveraging advanced drug delivery platforms such as nanoparticles, liposomes, gastro-retentive systems, vaccines, and wellness focused products. Panacea Biotec remains focused on merging cutting-edge science and technology with an unwavering commitment towards unmet medical needs while ensuring affordability. title: Launch of the DENSTAR project: advancing the licensure of a tetravalent live-attenuated dengue vaccine (DengiAll) in sub-Saharan Africa and to facilitate its global access
body: Launch of the DENSTAR project: advancing the licensure of a tetravalent live-attenuated dengue vaccine (DengiAll) in sub-Saharan Africa and to facilitate its global access English Global Launch of the DENSTAR project: advancing the licensure of a tetravalent live-attenuated dengue vaccine (DengiAll) in sub-Saharan Africa and to facilitate its global access June 8, 2026 PRESS RELEASE 8th June 2026 New Delhi Launch of the DENSTAR project: advancing the licensure of a tetravalent live-attenuated dengue vaccine (DengiAll) in sub-Saharan Africa and to facilitate its global access. Starting on the 1 June, the DENSTAR project will work to advance the licensure of the dengue vaccine DengiAll in sub-Saharan Africa (sSA) and to facilitate its broader global use. The four-year initiative is funded under the Global Health European & Developing Countries Clinical Trials Partnership 3 Joint Undertaking (GH EDCTP3 JU), supported by the European Union and aligns with the EDCTP3 mission to combat Neglected Tropical Diseases (NTDs), including dengue fever, and seeks to reduce the disease burden across Africa. Dengue is a rapidly growing global health threat, transmitted by infected mosquitoes. In Africa, outbreaks are increasing, yet the true disease burden remains underestimated. While many infections are mild, severe cases can lead to shock, bleeding, and organ failure. With no specific antiviral treatment available, prevention relies largely on mosquito control, which is increasingly challenged by climate change, urbanization, and insecticide resistance. Existing vaccines offer only partial protection and are difficult to deploy widely, highlighting the urgent need for a safe, effective, and widely accessible solution. The DENSTAR project is coordinated by the “Sclavo Vaccines Association”, a non-profit organization based in Siena (Italy) devoted to support vaccine research and development in developing countries. The consortium unites 10 Partners from 9 countries across Europe, Africa, the United States, India and South Korea. DENSTAR comprises universities, research organizations, a biotech company and a non-profit organization, bringing together experts, researchers, regulators, healthcare practitioners. A key partner is Panacea Biotec Limited (India), developer of DengiAll, a tetravalent dengue vaccine targeting all four virus serotypes and currently in late-stage development in India. This diverse and complementary consortium embodies a great public-private partnership, fully aligned with the DENSTAR project's goal to promote broader use of DengiAll in Africa and globally, contributing to equitable access to safe and effective dengue prevention tools. The DENSTAR consortium will conduct Phase I/III studies in healthy African adults and children to confirm that the DengiAll vaccine works safely and effectively in this population, paving the way for regulatory approval and deployment in sSA. The project will also address critical knowledge gaps by evaluating vaccine efficacy against Dengue Virus serotype 4 (DENV-4) using Controlled Human Infection Models (CHIMs), an area where no vaccine has yet demonstrated protection, making this research essential to strengthening scientific evidence, and public confidence in future vaccine wider use. The vaccine offers several advantages for widespread use, particularly in lower- and middle-income countries. It is single-dose, cost-efficient to manufacture, and suitable for large-scale deployment and technology transfer. Unlike other dengue vaccines, it requires no prior serological testing, making it a practical and scalable solution for diverse populations and equitable immunization strategies. Prof. Donata Medaglini, Deputy Rector of the University of Siena, Chief Scientific Officer of SVA and DENSTAR Coordinator says: “DENSTAR is a unique consortium that concentrates international excellence in vaccine research, development, manufacture, and clinical trials. By uniting top experts from academia, industry, and non-profit organization we are forging a true public-private partnership to bridge critical gaps in dengue prevention. By making a dengue vaccine available in Africa, we will uphold the universal right of every individual to a healthy and productive life. We have high hopes to advance the licensure of DengiAll in sub-Saharan Africa and beyond.” Prof. Ellis Owusu-Dabo, pro-vice-chancellor of the Kwame Nkrumah University of Science and Technology, Professor of Epidemiology and Global Health at School of Public Health of the same University, and Scientific project Lead of DENSTAR added: “Dengue infections can range from mild to potentially fatal in the most severe cases. It is becoming more common in sub-Saharan African, driven primarily by climate change. The primary challenge of the DENSTAR project is to advance a live-attenuated tetravalent dengue vaccine through immunobridging and controlled human infection model studies to enable its licensure in sub-Saharan Africa, where dengue infections have become more common.” Dr. Khalid Ali Syed, Chief Scientific Officer of Panacea Biotec Limited added: “The project efforts are expected to have a lasting impact on global health, extending beyond the project's immediate scope and duration by reducing the dengue burden, improving quality of life, alleviating pressure on health systems, and upholding the universal right to a healthy, productive life." Prof. Till Bärnighausen, Director of the Heidelberg Institute for Global Health (HIGH), and Dr. Florian Marks, Deputy Director General of the Epidemiology, Public Health, and Impact (EPIC) unit at the International Vaccine Institute and scientist at the HIGH, highlighted: “A key strength of DENSTAR is its commitment to sustainable capacity advancement alongside vaccine development. The project plans to support training opportunities for MPH and PhD students embedded in the participating institutions, while also strengthening the readiness of African study sites to conduct high-quality clinical trials and related project activities. By working jointly with participating sites and institutions, DENSTAR will help build locally led research capacity that continues beyond the lifetime of the project.” Facts about DENSTAR: Title: Dengue Efficacy and Safety Trial in African Region Acronym: DENSTAR Duration and start date: 48 months from 1st June 2026 Coordinator: • Sclavo Vaccines Association ETS (Italy) EDCTP contribution: 11 091 138.75 € Granting authority: This project is part of the Global Health EDCTP3 JU programme supported by the European Union (Grant number: 101249135 – DENSTAR) Participants: • Sclavo Vaccines Association ETS (Italy) • Panacea Biotec Limited (India) • Kwame Nkrumah University of Science and Technology (Ghana) • Universitätsklinikum Heidelberg (Germany) • National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (United States) • International Vaccine Institute (Republic of Korea) • Centre de Recherches Medicales de Lambaréné (Gabon) • Instituto Nacional de Saúde (Mozambique) •Johns Hopkins University (United States) • Institut National De Recherche Biomedicale Du Zaire (Democratic Republic of the Congo) “Funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or Global Health EDCTP3 JU. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.” About Panacea Biotec Panacea Biotec is a leading biotechnology firm with established research, manufacturing and marketing capabilities. We have played a vital role in Polio eradication in India by delivering over 10 billion doses of oral polio vaccines. Our journey has been marked by Polio eradication leading to a bigger impact across infectious diseases. Panacea Biotec has pioneered in the development of innovative fully-liquid combination vaccines that can be stored at 2-8 degree Celsius temperature. We have also launched the world's first fully liquid wP-IPV based hexavalent vaccine EasySix (DTwP-HepB-Hib-IPV) in India in March 2017. We have also made available over 220 million doses of fully-liquid combination vaccines across the world. We have supplied vaccines for over 100 million people in 2025 alone. Our innovations have helped increase paediatric immunization coverage, provided significant savings in the overall cost of immunization, improved healthcare systems, and saved the lives of millions of children in developing countries. The other key vaccines in portfolio are Easyfive-TT (DTwP-HepB-Hib), EasyFour-TT (DTwP-Hib), IPV based tetravalent vaccine - EasyFour-Pol (DTwP-IPV) and Bivalent oral polio vaccine (type-1 and type-3). Panacea Biotec’s new vaccines in pipeline are Pneumococcal Conjugate Vaccine - NucoVac-11 and Recombinant Tetravalent Dengue Candidate Vaccine - DengiAll and Td (tetanus and diphtheria - reduced). Panacea Biotec has launched its consumer arm called 7N Panacea Biotec created to bring science-driven, everyday healthcare solutions directly to families. The “7N” philosophy stands for Nutrition, Nurture, Nature, Newness, Novelty, Necessity, and Nourishment - seven pillars that guide the development of every product. From advanced nutritional supplements to baby care essentials, 7N Panacea Biotec blends purity, innovation, and affordability to ensure healthier lives across generations. Our Nutritional products include ChilRun full, ChilRun full No Sucrose, and ChilRun 7+ that support a child's total growth and development requirements. We have launched NikoMom, to meet the needs of mothers and newborn babies through natural, safe, and non-toxic products. Under this brand, we have launched Baby Massage Oil, Head-to-toe wash, Daily Lotion, Diaper Rash Cream, Diapers and Wet wipes. Staart is India’s safest infant formula that is free from maltodextrin, palm oil, fructose, table sugar etc. and fortified with prebiotics. title: Press Release - Empowering Public Health Across the African Region
body: Press Release - Empowering Public Health Across the African Region English Global Press Release - Empowering Public Health Across the African Region June 2, 2025 PRESS RELEASE June 2nd, 2025 | New Delhi Empowering Public Health Across the African Region Panacea Biotec Receives cGMP certificate under AMRH and EAEU Program Panacea Biotec, a global leader in vaccine innovation and high-quality biopharmaceuticals, proudly announces receipt of African Medical Agency Green Book listing, a publicly available registry published by the African Medicines Regulatory Harmonisation (AMRH), that lists human medicinal products which have undergone African continental evaluation and received a positive opinion regarding safety, efficacy, and quality. We are proud to share that EasySix has been recognised and listed by the Green Book . EasySix, World’s First Fully-Liquid wP-IPV Based Hexavalent Vaccine, provides safe, effective, and WHO-prequalified immunization against 6 deadly diseases, streamlining vaccination schedules and enhancing national immunization programs. EasySix protects against Diphtheria, Tetanus, Pertussis, Hepatitis B, Haemophilus influenzae type b (Hib), and Poliovirus. Panacea Biotec has also received cGMP (current Good Manufacturing Practice) from the Kazakhstan Ministry of Health, under the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) harmonization program and cGMP from Philippines. With this milestone, Panacea Biotec expands its reach across all African and EAEU member states, including Armenia, Belarus, Kyrgyzstan, and Russia, unlocking unified regulatory access and streamlined distribution pathways. Innovation That Builds Trust Global Quality, Regionally Recognized: Trusted by national immunization programs across Africa, Asia, Latin America, and Eastern Europe. cGMP Certified: Reflecting our commitment to the highest international standards in pharmaceutical manufacturing. Robust Pipeline: NuCoVac-13: a pneumococcal conjugate vaccine (PCV) with 13 serotypes DengiAll: Live, attenuated chimeric recombinant tetravalent candidate vaccine TedShot : Td (tetanus and diphtheria – reduced) for Adults, Pregnant Women, and Children “Welcoming Strategic Distribution Partners” - Mr. PD Karan “We are actively seeking new distribution partners across Africa, Uzbekistan, and the EAEU region to support the roll-out of EasySix and our upcoming product pipeline.” mentioned Mr. PD Karan, Vice President at Panacea Biotec. Join hands with Panacea Biotec - a name synonymous with quality, safety, and innovation in immunization. Together, Let’s Build a Healthier World. Email us at Contact Us and Select ‘Business Development - Biologicals and Vaccines’ About Panacea Biotec Panacea Biotec Limited is a leading pharmaceutical and biotechnology company with established research, manufacturing and marketing capabilities. Panacea Biotec’s wholly-owned subsidiary, Panacea Biotec Pharma Limited has pioneered in the development of innovative fully-liquid combination vaccines that can be stored at 2-8 degree Celsius temperature. Panacea Biotec has also launched the world's first fully liquid wP-IPV based hexavalent vaccine EasySix (DTwP-HepB-Hib-IPV) in India in March 2017. We have made available over 200 million doses of fully-liquid combination vaccines across the world. The other key vaccines in portfolio are Easyfive-TT (DTwP-HepB-Hib), EasyFour-TT (DTwP-Hib), IPV based tetravalent vaccine – EasyFour-Pol (DTwP-IPV) and Bivalent oral polio vaccine (type-1 and type-3). Panacea Biotec’s new vaccines in pipeline are Pneumococcal Conjugate Vaccine - NucoVac-11, NuCoVac-13 and Recombinant Tetravalent Dengue Candidate Vaccine - DengiALL and India’s first thiomersal free Td (tetanus and diphtheria – reduced). title: CIS ийн бүс нутаг даяар нийгмийн эрүүл мэндийг бэхжүүлэх
body: CIS ийн бүс нутаг даяар нийгмийн эрүүл мэндийг бэхжүүлэх English Global CIS ийн бүс нутаг даяар нийгмийн эрүүл мэндийг бэхжүүлэх May 24, 2025 ХЭВЛЭЛИЙН МЭДЭЭ 2025 оны тавдугаар сарын 24 | Шинэ Дели CIS ийн бүс нутаг даяар нийгмийн эрүүл мэндийг бэхжүүлэх Panacea Biotec нь ЕАEU хөтөлбөрийн хүрээнд cGMP зөвшөөрлийг хүлээн авлаа Панасеа Биотек, вакцин инновацийн болон өндөр чанартай биофармацевтик бүтээгдэхүүний дэлхийн тэргүүлэгч компани, Казахстаны Эрүүл Мэндийн Яамнаас EAEU (Евразийн Эдийн Засгийн Нэгдэл) нэгтгэлийн хөтөлбөрийн хүрээнд cGMP (одоогийн сайн үйлдвэрлэлийн практик)-ыг хүлээн авсан гэдгээ бахархан зарлаж байна. Тэдний орчин үеийн вакцин үйлдвэрлэлийн үйлдвэр. EasySix - Дэлхийн анхны бүрэн шингэн wP-IPV дээр суурилсан зургаан валент вакцин 2020 оноос эхлэн Казахстанд бүртгүүлсэн EasySix нь зургаан аюултай өвчнөөс хамгаалах аюулгүй, үр дүнтэй, ДЭМБ-ын баталгаажуулсан вакцинжуулалтыг санал болгодог бөгөөд вакцинжуулалтын хуваарийг энгийн болгож, үндэсний вакцинжуулалтын хөтөлбөрийг сайжруулдаг. EasySix нь Дифтерия, Тетанус, Хulsus, В Hepatitis B, Haemophilus influenzae төрөл b (Hib) болон Poliovirus (IPV)-аас хамгаалдаг. EasySix нь Узбекистанад мөн бүртгэгдсэн. ЕАEU ын бүс нутаг руу гүүр. Энэхүү амжилттайгаар Panacea Biotec Казахстаныг гадагшлуулан Узбекстан болон ЕАEU ын гишүүн улсуудад, Армени, Беларус, Кыргызстан, Орос зэрэг улсуудыг хамруулан нэгтгэсэн зохицуулалтын нэвтрэлтийг нээж, хялбарласан тараалтын замуудыг бий болгож байна. Итгэлцлийг бий болгодог инноваци Дэлхий нийтийн чанар, орон нутагт хүлээн зөвшөөрөгдсөн: Африк, Ази, Латин Америк, Зүүн Европ дахь үндэсний дархлаажуулалтын хөтөлбөрүүдэд итгэмжлэгдсэн. cGMP сертификаттай: Эм үйлдвэрлэлийн өндөр олон улсын стандартыг мөрдлөг болгон авч үзэж буйг илэрхийлдэг. Чухал хоолой: NuCoVac-13: 13 серотиптэй пневмококкын конjugate вакцин (PCV) DengiAll: Амьд, хоолойн хольцтой, хүний олон нийтийн чадвартай дөрвөн төрөлтэй вакцин “Стратегийн түншүүдийг угтан авсан тухай” - Мистер ПД Кара “Бид Оросын дараах зах зээлд шинэ түгээх түншүүдийг идэвхтэй эрэлхийлж байна, ялангуяа Узбекстан, Киргизстан, Армени, Беларусь улсад EasySix болон манай удахгүй гарах бүтээгдэхүүний шугамыг дэмжихийн тулд” гэж Панасея Биотек компанийн дэд ерөнхийлөгч Ноён П.Д. Каран дурдлаа. Panacea Biotec-тэй хамтран ажиллацгаая - вакцины чанар, аюулгүй байдал, инновацын бэлгэдэл. Хамтдаа Эрүүл Суудалтай Дэлхийг бүтээе. Бидэнд цахим шуудангаар 'Бизнес хөгжүүлэлт - Биологийн болон вакцин' хэмээн сонгон холбоо барина уу. Panacea Biotec-ийн тухай Панасея Биотек Лимитед нь тогтвортой судалгаа, үйлдвэрлэл, маркетингийн чадвартай тэргүүлэх эмийн болон биотехнологийн компани юм. Панасеа Биотек-ийн бүрэн эзэмшдэг охин компани Панасеа Биотек Фарма Лимитед нь 2-8 градус Цельсийн хэмд хадгалагдах боломжтой шинэ, бүрэн шингэн хосолсон вакциныг хөгжүүлэхэд анхдагч болсон. Панасеа Биотек нь 2017 оны гуравдугаар сард Энэтхэг улсад дэлхийн анхны бүрэн шингэн wP-IPV суурьтай зургаалсан вакциныг EasySix™ (DTwP-HepB-Hib-IPV) хэлбэрээр гаргасан. Бид дэлхийн хэмжээнд 200 саяас дээш бүрэн шингэн хосолсон вакциныг нийлүүлсэн. Тусгай вакцинуудын портфелийн бусад гол вакцинууд нь Easyfive-TT (DTwP-HepB-Hib), EasyFour-TT (DTwP-Hib), IPV суурьтай тетравалент вакцин – EasyFour-Pol (DTwP-IPV) болон хоёр давхар амны полио вакцин (1-р төрөл ба 3-р төрөл) юм. Panacea Biotec-ийн шинэ вакцинууд нь пневмококк илрүүлэгч вакцин - NucoVac-11 болон Рекомбинант тетравалент денгийн нэр дэвшигч вакцин - DengiALL, мөн Энэтхэгийн анхны тиомерсалгүй Td (тэсэн наалддаг болон хэтрэлт - буурсан) юм. title: Renforcer la santé publique à travers la région africaine
body: Renforcer la santé publique à travers la région africaine English Global Renforcer la santé publique à travers la région africaine June 2, 2025 COMMUNIQUÉ DE PRESSE 2 juin 2025 | New Delhi Renforcer la santé publique à travers la région africaine Panacea Biotec reçoit le certificat cGMP dans le cadre du programme AMRH et EAEU Panacea Biotec, un leader mondial de l'innovation vaccinale et des biopharmaceutiques de haute qualité, annonce fièrement avoir reçu l'inscription au Green Book de l'Agence Médicale Africaine, un registre public publié par l'Harmonisation Réglementaire des Médicaments en Afrique (AMRH), qui répertorie les produits médicinaux humains ayant subi une évaluation continentale africaine et ayant reçu un avis favorable concernant la sécurité, l'efficacité et la qualité. Nous sommes fiers d'annoncer qu'EasySix a été reconnu et inscrit dans le Green Book . EasySix, le tout premier vaccin hexavalent entièrement liquide basé sur le wP-IPV, offre une immunisation sûre, efficace et préqualifiée par WHO contre 6 maladies mortelles, rationalisant les calendriers de vaccination et améliorant les programmes nationaux d'immunisation. EasySix protège contre la diphtérie, le tétanos, la coqueluche, l'hépatite B, Haemophilus influenzae de type b (Hib) et le poliovirus . Panacea Biotec a également reçu la cGMP (pratiques de fabrication actuelles) du ministère de la Santé du Kazakhstan, dans le cadre du programme d'harmonisation de l'Union Économique Eurasienne (EAEU) et la cGMP des Philippines. Avec cette étape, Panacea Biotec élargit sa portée à tous les États membres de l'Afrique et de l'EAEU, y compris l'Arménie, la Biélorussie, le Kirghizistan et la Russie, ouvrant l'accès à une réglementation unifiée et des voies de distribution simplifiées. Innovation qui construit la confiance ● Qualité globale, reconnue au niveau régional : Fiable pour les programmes nationaux de vaccination à travers l'Afrique, l'Asie, l'Amérique Latine et l'Europe de l'Est. Certifié cGMP : Reflétant notre engagement envers les normes internationales les    plus élevées en matière de fabrication pharmaceutique. Pipeline robuste : NuCoVac-13 : un vaccin conjugué contre le pneumocoque (PCV) avec 13 sérotypes DengiAll : vaccin candidat tétravalen recombinant chimérique atténué vivant TedShot : Td (tétanos et diphtérie – réduit) pour les adultes, les femmes enceintes et les enfants “Partenaires de distribution stratégique accueillants - M. PD Karan “Nous cherchons activement de nouveaux partenaires de distribution à travers l'Afrique, l'Ouzbékistan et la région de EAEU pour soutenir le déploiement d'EasySix et notre future gamme de produits.” a déclaré M. PD Karan, vice-président de Panacea Biotec. Unissez-vous à Panacea Biotec - un nom synonyme de qualité, de sécurité et d'innovation en matière d'immunisation. Ensemble, construisons un monde plus sain. Envoyez-nous un courriel à Contactez-nous et sélectionnez 'Développement commercial - Biologiques et Vaccins'. À propos de Panacea Biotec Panacea Biotec Limited est une entreprise pharmaceutique et biotechnologique de premier plan avec des capacités de recherche, de fabrication et de commercialisation établies. La filiale à part entière de Panacea Biotec, Panacea Biotec Pharma Limited, a été pionnière dans le développement de vaccins combinés innovants entièrement liquides pouvant être stockés à une température de 2 à 8 degrés Celsius. Panacea Biotec a également lancé le premier vaccin hexavalent entièrement liquide à base de wP-IPV, EasySix (DTwP-HepB-Hib-IPV), en Inde en mars 2017. Nous avons mis à disposition plus de 200 millions de doses de vaccins combinés totalement liquides à travers le monde. Les autres vaccins clés du portefeuille sont Easyfive-TT (DTwP-HepB-Hib), EasyFour-TT (DTwP-Hib), le vaccin tétravalent basé sur l'IPV - EasyFour-Pol (DTwP-IPV) et le vaccin oral polio bivalant (type-1 et type-3). Les nouveaux vaccins de Panacea Biotec en développement sont le Vaccin Conjugué Pneumococcique - NucoVac-11, NuCoVac-13 et le Vaccin Candidat Tétravalent Recombinant contre la Dengue - DengiALL, ainsi que le premier Td (tétanos et diphtérie – réduit) sans thimerosal en Inde. title: Capacitar a Saúde Pública em toda a Região Africana
body: Capacitar a Saúde Pública em toda a Região Africana English Global Capacitar a Saúde Pública em toda a Região Africana June 2, 2025 COMUNICADO DE IMPRENSA 2 de junho de 2025 | Nova Deli Capacitar a Saúde Pública em toda a Região Africana A Panacea Biotec recebe o certificado cGMP sob o Programa AMRH e EAEU A Panacea Biotec, um líder global em inovação de vacinas e biofármacos de alta qualidade, anuncia com orgulho a receção da lista Green Book da Agência Médica Africana, um registo disponível publicamente publicado pela Harmonização Regulatória de Medicamentos Africanos (AMRH), que lista produtos medicinais humanos que foram avaliados a nível continental africano e receberam uma opinião positiva quanto à segurança, eficácia e qualidade. Estamos orgulhosos de compartilhar que a EasySix foi reconhecida e incluída no Green Book . EasySix, a primeira vacina hexavalente totalmente líquida baseada em wP-IPV do mundo , proporciona uma imunização segura, eficaz e pré-qualificada pela OMS contra 6 doenças mortais, simplificando os calendários de vacinação e melhorando os programas nacionais de imunização. EasySix protege contra Difteria, Tetano, Tosse Convulsa, Hepatite B, Haemophilus influenzae tipo b (Hib) e Poliovírus . A Panacea Biotec também recebeu cGMP (práticas de fabricação atualizadas) do Ministério da Saúde do Cazaquistão, no âmbito do programa de harmonização da União Económica da Eurásia (EAEU) e cGMP das Filipinas. Com este marco, a Panacea Biotec expande o seu alcance por todos os estados membros da África e da EAEU, incluindo a Arménia, a Bielorrússia, o Quirguistão e a Rússia, desbloqueando um acesso regulatório unificado e caminhos de distribuição simplificados. Inovação que Constrói Confiança ● Qualidade Global, Reconhecida Regionalmente: Confiável por programas nacionais de imunização em África, Ásia, América Latina e Europa Oriental. ●  Certificado cGMP: Refletindo o nosso compromisso com os mais altos padrões internacionais na fabricação farmacêutica. Pipeline Robusta: NuCoVac-13: uma vacina conjugada contra o pneumococo (PCV) com 13 sorótipos ● Dengi All: Vacina candidata tetravalente recombinante quimérica atenuada TedShot: Td (tétano e difteria – reduzido) para Adultos, Mulheres Grávidas e Crianças “Acolhendo Parceiros de Distribuição Estratégica - Sr. PD Karan “Estamos ativamente à procura de novos parceiros de distribuição em África, Uzbequistão e na região da EAEU para apoiar o lançamento do EasySix e da nossa próxima linha de produtos.” mencionou o Sr. PD Karan, Vice-Presidente da Panacea Biotec. Junte-se à Panacea Biotec - um nome sinónimo de qualidade, segurança e inovação na imunização. Juntos, vamos construir um mundo mais saudável. Junte-se à Panacea Biotec - um nome sinónimo de qualidade, segurança e inovação na imunização. Juntos, Vamos Construir um Mundo Mais Saudável. A subsidiária de propriedade integral da Panacea Biotec, a Panacea Biotec Pharma Limited, foi pioneira no desenvolvimento de vacinas combinadas totalmente líquidas inovadoras que podem ser armazenadas a temperaturas entre 2 e 8 graus Celsius. title: CIS mintaqasida jamoat salomatligini mustahkamlash
body: CIS mintaqasida jamoat salomatligini mustahkamlash English Global CIS mintaqasida jamoat salomatligini mustahkamlash May 24, 2025 MATBUOT XABARNOMASI 2025-yil 24-may | Nyu-Deli CIS mintaqasida jamoat salomatligini mustahkamlash Panacea Biotec EAEU dasturi doirasida cGMP ruxsatini oldi Panacea Biotec, vaksina innovatsiyasida va yuqori sifatli biopharmasevtika mahsulotlarida jahon yetakchisi sifatida, o'zining zamonaviy vaksina ishlab chiqarish zavodiga Yevrosiyo Iqtisodiy Ittifoqi (EAEU) moslashtirish dasturi doirasida Qozog'iston Sog'liqni Saqlash Vazirligidan cGMP (hozirgi Yaxshi Ishlab Chiqarish Amaliyoti) sertifikatini olganini faxr bilan e'lon qiladi. EasySix - Dunyoning birinchi to'liq suyuqlikli wP-IPV asosidagi hexavalent vaksina 2020-yildan Qozog‘istonda ro‘yxatdan o‘tgan EasySix, olti nafratli kasalliklarga qarshi xavfsiz, samarali va Jahon sog‘liqni saqlash tashkiloti tomonidan tasdiqlangan emlash xizmatini taqdim etadi, emlash rejalari va milliy emlash dasturlarini soddalashtiradi. EasySix difteriya, tetanus, ko‘krak qafasini yallig‘lanishi, gepatit B, Haemophilus influenzae turidagi b (IPV) va poliovirus (IPV) dan himoya qiladi. EasySix, shuningdek, O‘zbekistonda ham ro‘yxatdan o‘tgan. EAEU mintaqasining barcha joylariga kirish eshigi Ushbu yutuq bilan Panacea Biotec o'z faoliyatini Qozog'istondan O'zbekistonga va EAEU a'zo davlatlariga, jumladan Armaniston, Belarus, Qirg'iziston va Rossiyaga kengaytiradi, bu esa yagona regulyator kirish imkoniyatlarini va soddalashtirilgan tarqatish yo'llarini ochadi. Ishonchni quruvchi innovatsiyalar Global sifat, mahalliy tan olingan: Afrika, Osiyo, Lotin Amerikasi va Sharqiy Yevropa bo'ylab milliy emlash dasturlari tomonidan ishonchli. cGMP Sertifikatlangan: Dori ishlab chiqarishdagi eng yuqori xalqaro standartlarga bo'lgan sadoqatimizni aks ettiradi. Qattiq Tasma: NuCoVac-13: 13 serotipli pnevmokok konjugat vaksin (PCV) DengiAll: Jonli, susaytirilgan chimera rekombinant tetravalent nomzod vaksinasi “Strategik Ta'minot Hamkorlarini Kutib Olish - Janob PD Karan “Biz CIS bozorlarida, xususan, O‘zbekiston, Qirg‘iziston, Armaniston va Belarusda EasySix va kelgusida ishlab chiqariladigan mahsulotlarni ishlab chiqarishni qo‘llab-quvvatlash uchun yangi distribyutorlik hamkorlarini faol izlayapmiz”. Panacea Biotec kompaniyasi vitse-prezidenti janob PD Karanni eslatib o'tdi. Panacea Biotec bilan qo‘lni birlashtiring - immunizatsiyada sifat, xavfsizlik va innovatsiya bilan sinonim bo‘lgan nom. Birozdan keyin, Kelaylik sog‘lom dunyo quraylik. Biz bilan bog'laning va "Biznesni rivojlantirish - biologik moddalar va vaktsinalar" ni tanlang. Panacea Biotec haqida Panacea Biotec Limited - o'rnatilgan tadqiqot, ishlab chiqarish va marketing imkoniyatlariga ega bo'lgan yetakchi farmatsevtika va biotexnologiya kompaniyasidir. Panacea Biotec kompaniyasining toʻliq mulkchisi, Panacea Biotec Pharma Limited, 2-8 daraja Selsiyda saqlanadigan innovatsion toʻliq suyuqlik kombinatsiyali vaksinalarni ishlab chiqishda oldinda bormoqda. Panacea Biotec 2017 yil martda Hindistonda dunyodagi birinchi to'liq suyuq wP-IPV asosidagi hexavalent vaksinasini EasySix™ (DTwP-HepB-Hib-IPV) taqdim etdi. Biz global miqyosda to'liq suyuq kombinatsion vaksinalarning 200 milliondan ortiq dozasini taqdim etdik. Portfeldegi boshqa muhim vaksinalar Easyfive-TT (DTwP-HepB-Hib), EasyFour-TT (DTwP-Hib), IPV asosidagi tetravalent vaksina - EasyFour-Pol (DTwP-IPV) va ikki tomonlama og'zaki poliomielit vaksinasidir (1-turi va 3-turi). Panacea Biotec kompaniyasining yangi vaksinalari Pneumokok Konjugat Vaksinasi - NucoVac-11 va Rekombinant Tetravalent Denge Nomzod Vaksinasi - DengiALL va Hindistonning birinchi tiomersal to'siqsiz Td (tetanus va difteriya – kamaytirilgan). media so'rovlar uchun, iltimos, bog'laning: Janob P.D. title: Press Release - Launch of Niko Mom Baby Skin Care
body: Press Release - Launch of Niko Mom Baby Skin Care English Global Press Release - Launch of Niko Mom Baby Skin Care September 25, 2025 PRESS RELEASE New Delhi 24 September 2025 Panacea Biotec Launches India’s first 100% toxin-free and safe NikoMom Baby Skin Care Panacea Biotec proudly announces the launch of NikoMom Baby Skin Care products, a specially crafted line of products designed to nurture babies with the utmost care, safety, and scientific precision. Built on Panacea Biotec’s legacy of innovation in healthcare, NikoMom combines plant-based natural ingredients, dermatologically tested formulations, and modern research to deliver the gentlest care for babies. NikoMom Baby Care Expert has been developed with a focus on safety, purity, and effectiveness. Each product is hypoallergenic, toxin-free, and dermatologically tested, ensuring that delicate baby skin receives only the best. Infused with natural oils, plant-based extracts, and nourishing vitamins, the range provides holistic baby care without harmful chemicals like parabens, sulfates, silicones, or artificial dyes. NikoMom Baby Care covers a wide spectrum of everyday essentials for new born babies. They complement the already available NikoMom Tape Diapers and NikoMom Diaper Pants. Baby Massage Oil : Powered by ‘ Hydranest Technology’ that strengthens muscles and bones, deeply hydrates the skin and enhances skin elasticity. Baby Head to Toe Wash: Powered by ‘ TenderNest Technology’ that gently cleanses delicate skin, prevents skin from moisture loss and protects skin’s natural oils. Baby Daily Lotion: Powered by ‘ DermaNest Technology’ that provides 24 hour hydration, strengthens skin’s moisture barrier and promotes smooth and healthy skin. Baby Diaper Rash Cream: Powered by ‘ HealNest Technology’ that boosts cellular skin repair, soothes and protects skin and prevents rash triggers. NikoMom Baby Care complements NikoMom Diaper Pants and NikoMom Tape Diapers. NikoMom Diaper Pants are Easy-to-wear pull-up style with 360° comfort fit and up to 12 hours of dryness for active babies while, NikoMom Tape Diapers are Gentle tape-fastened diapers designed for newborns, offering soft protection and leak-proof comfort. At NikoMom, our commitment goes beyond gentle baby care — it is about delivering purity powered by technology. Each product is crafted with advanced research and innovation to provide affordable healthcare solutions for every family. By combining science-backed formulations with naturally safe ingredients, NikoMom ensures babies receive the purest care possible. All products are free from toxic chemicals such as parabens, sulfates, silicones, mineral oils, and artificial dyes — because we believe every child deserves a safe, healthy start in life. A Legacy of Innovation and Care “With the launch of the NikoMom Skin Care, we are extending this commitment to the most precious members of our families — our babies. NikoMom stands for purity, safety, and innovation, ensuring that every child receives the gentlest care without toxic chemicals. This is not just a product range, but a promise of healthier, happier beginnings for every baby and peace of mind for every parent. ”- said Dr. Rajesh Jain, Chairman and Managing Director, Panacea Biotec Ltd . About Panacea Biotec Panacea Biotec is a leading biotechnology company with established research, manufacturing and marketing capabilities in vaccines, pharmaceuticals, and nutrition. Panacea Biotec has launched its consumer arm called 7N Panacea Biotec created to bring science-driven, everyday healthcare solutions directly to families. The “7N” philosophy stands for Nutrition, Nurture, Nature, Newness, Novelty, Necessity, and Nourishment — seven pillars that guide the development of every product. From advanced nutritional supplements to baby care essentials, 7N Panacea Biotec blends purity, innovation, and affordability to ensure healthier lives across generations. All 7N products are doctor recommended and scientifically tested. 7NShop.com is the official online destination for 7N Panacea Biotec products, offering consumers a convenient and trusted platform to access safe, high-quality, and science-backed healthcare solutions. The e-commerce platform brings together the complete range of nutritional supplements, baby care, wellness products, and preventive health solutions under one roof. With secure payments, free shipping, doorstep delivery, and exclusive offers , 7NShop.com ensures that advanced healthcare is accessible and affordable for every household. ChilRun provides clinically proven oral nutritional supplements, designed to be an additional source of nutrition to overcome the nutrition gap for growing children. It comes under 3 variants i.e. ChilRun full, ChilRun full No Sucrose, and ChilRun 7+. ChilRun full provides over 37 essential nutrients including protein, healthy fats, and carbohydrates with vitamins and minerals. It comes in 4 delicious flavours i.e. Chocolate, Mango, Vanilla, and Kesar Badam. For parents concerned about sugar intake, ChilRun full No Sucrose provides the same benefits with zero table sugar. All 7N Panacea Biotec products are available on www.7NShop.com along with online retailers like Amazon, Flipkart, Tata 1mg, etc. They are also available at a retailer near you! Panacea Biotec is one of the leading manufacturers of paediatric vaccines and has played a pivotal role in eradication of Poliomyelitis. Panacea Biotec has supplied more than 10 billion doses of polio vaccine in India and developing countries and supplied more than 200 million immunizations of   fully liquid wP based combination vaccines. Our innovations have helped increase paediatric immunization coverage, provided significant savings in the overall cost of immunization and saved the lives of millions of children in developing countries. The key products are Easyfive ® -TT (DTwP-HepB-Hib), EasyFour ® -TT (DTwP-Hib), IPV based tetravalent vaccine – EasyFour ® -Pol (DTwP-IPV) and Bivalent oral polio vaccine (type-1 and type-3). Panacea Biotec’s new vaccines in pipeline are Pneumococcal Conjugate Vaccine - NucoVac-11 ® and Recombinant Tetravalent Dengue Candidate Vaccine - DengiALL ® and Td (tetanus and diphtheria – reduced). title: Укрепление общественного здоровья в СНГ
body: Укрепление общественного здоровья в СНГ English Global Укрепление общественного здоровья в СНГ May 24, 2025 Новости пресс-службы 24 мая 2025 года | Новый Дели Укрепление общественного здоровья в СНГ Компания Panacea Biotec получила разрешение cGMP в соответствии с программой ЕАЭС Панасея Биотек, мировой лидер в области инноваций вакцин и высококачественных биофармацевтиков, с гордостью сообщает о получении сертификата cGMP (текущих стандартов надлежащей производственной практики) от Министерства здравоохранения Казахстана в рамках программы гармонизации Евразийского экономического союза (ЕАEU) для своего современного завода по производству вакцин. Легкие шесть - первая в мире полностью жидкая шестивалентная вакцина на основе wP-IPV Зарегистрированный в Казахстане с 2020 года, EasySix обеспечивает безопасную, эффективную и предварительно квалифицированную ВОЗ иммунизацию против шести опасных заболеваний, упрощая графики вакцинации и улучшая национальные программы иммунизации. EasySix защищает от дифтерии, столбняка, коклюша, гепатита B, гемофильной палочки типа b (Hib) и полиовируса (IPV). EasySix также зарегистрирован в Узбекистане. Ворота в весь регион EAEU С этой вехой Panacea Biotec расширяет свое присутствие за пределами Казахстана в Узбекистан и страны-члены ЕАEU, включая Армению, Беларусь, Кыргызстан и Россию, открывая единый регуляторный доступ и упрощенные пути распределения. Инновации, вызывающие доверие Глобальное качество, местно признанное: доверие национальным программам вакцинации по всей Африке, Азии, Латинской Америке и Восточной Европе. Сертифицировано по cGMP: Подтверждение нашей приверженности самым высоким международным стандартам в производстве фармацевтической продукции. Надежный конвейер: НюКоВак -13: пневмококковая конъюгированная вакцина (PCV) 13 серотипами ДеньгиВсем: Живая, аттенуированная химерная рекомбинантная тетра valentная кандидатная вакцина “Добро пожаловать, стратегические партнеры по распределению” - г-н ПД Караан “Мы активно ищем новых партнеров по сбыту на рынках СНГ, особенно в Узбекистане, Кыргызстане, Армении и Беларуси, чтобы поддержать развертывание EasySix и нашу предстоящую линейку продуктов», - отметил г-н.Д. Каран, вице-президент Панасеа Биотек. Объединитесь с Panacea Biotec - именем, synonymous с качеством, безопасностью и инновациями в иммунизации. Вместе давайте строить более здоровый мир. Напишите нам по адресу Связаться с нами и выберите «Развитие бизнеса - Биологические препараты и вакцины» О Panacea Biotec Панасеа Биотек Лимитед является ведущей фармацевтической и биотехнологической компанией с установленными исследовательскими, производственными и маркетинговыми возможностями. Полностью принадлежащее дочернее предприятие Panacea Biotec, компания Panacea Biotec Pharma Limited, стало пионером в разработке инновационных полностью жидких комбинированных вакцин, которые можно хранить при температуре от 2 до 8 градусов Цельсия. Панасея Биотек также запустила первую в мире полностью жидкую вакцину на основе wP-IPV с шестикратной защитой EasySix™ (DTwP-HepB-Hib-IPV) в Индии в марте 2017 года. Мы сделали доступными более 200 миллионов доз полностью жидких комбинированных вакцин по всему миру. Другими ключевыми вакцинами в портфеле являются Easyfive-TT (DTwP-HepB-Hib), EasyFour-TT (DTwP-Hib), четверная вакцина на основе ИПВ – EasyFour-Pol (DTwP-IPV) и бивалентная оральная вакцина против полиомиелита (тип-1 и тип-3). Новые вакцины Panacea Biotec в разработке – пневмококковая конъюгированная вакцина - NucoVac-11 и рекомбинантная четверная вакцина-кандидат против денге - DengiALL, а также первая в Индии вакцина Td (столбняк и дифтерия) без тиомерсала. title: تمكين الصحة العامة في جميع أنحاء الإقليم الأفريقي
body: تمكين الصحة العامة في جميع أنحاء الإقليم الأفريقي English Global تمكين الصحة العامة في جميع أنحاء الإقليم الأفريقي June 2, 2025 صحفي 2 يونيو, 2025 | نيودلهي تمكين الصحة العامة في جميع أنحاء الإقليم الأفريقي باناكيا بيوتيك تحصل على شهادة cGMP بموجب AMRH و EAEU أعلنت باناكيا بيوتيك ، الشركة الرائدة عالميا في ابتكار اللقاحات والمستحضرات الصيدلانية الحيوية عالية الجودة ، بفخر عن استلام قائمة الكتاب الأخضر للوكالة الطبية الأفريقية ، وهو سجل متاح للجمهور نشرته تنسيق تنظيم الأدوية الأفريقية (AMRH) ، والذي يسرد المنتجات الطبية البشرية التي خضعت للتقييم القاري الأفريقي وحصلت على رأي إيجابي فيما يتعلق بالسلامة والفعالية والجودة. نحن فخورون بمشاركة أن إيسيسيكس قد تم الاعتراف بها وإدراجها في الكتاب الأخضر . يوفر إيسيسيكس ، أول لقاح سداسي التكافؤ قائم على wP-IPV سائل بالكامل في العالم ، تحصينا آمنا وفعالا ومؤهلا مسبقا من قبل منظمة الصحة العالمية ضد 6 أمراض فتاكة ، مما يبسط جداول التطعيم ويعزز برامج التحصين الوطنية. يحمي إيسيسيكس من الدفتيريا والكزاز والسعال الديكي والتهاب الكبد بي والمستدمية النزلية من النوع بي (Hib) وفيروس شلل الأطفال. كما حصلت باناكيا بيوتيك على cGMP (ممارسات التصنيع الجيدة الحالية) من وزارة الصحة في كازاخستان ، في إطار برنامج المواءمة للاتحاد الاقتصادي الأوراسي (EAEU) و cGMP من الفلبين. وبهذا الإنجاز، توسع "باناسيا بيوتك" نطاق وصولها إلى جميع الدول الأعضاء في الاتحاد الاقتصادي الأوري، بما في ذلك أرمينيا وبيلاروسيا وقيرغيزستان وروسيا، مما يتيح الوصول التنظيمي الموحد ومسارات التوزيع المبسطة. الابتكار الذي يبني الثقة الجودة العالمية المعترف بها إقليميا: موثوق بها من قبل برامج التحصين الوطنية في جميع أنحاء إفريقيا وآسيا وأمريكا اللاتينية وأوروبا الشرقية. معتمد من cGMP: يعكس التزامنا بأعلى المعايير الدولية في تصنيع الأدوية. خط أنابيب قوي: نيوكو فاك-13: لقاح متقارن بالمكورات الرئوية (PCV) مع 13 نمطا مصليا دينجي آل: لقاح مرشح رباعي التكافؤ المؤتلف الخيمري الحي الموهن تيد شوت : ت د (تطعيم الكزاز والدفتيريا - مخفف) للبالغين والنساء الحوامل والأطفال "الترحيب بشركاء التوزيع الاستراتيجي" - السيد بي دي كاران "نحن نبحث بنشاط عن شركاء توزيع جدد في جميع أنحاء إفريقيا وأوزبكستان ومنطقة EAEU لدعم طرح إيسيسيكس وخط أنابيب منتجاتنا القادمة." ذكر السيد بي دي كاران ، نائب الرئيس في باناكيا بيوتيك. تعاون مع باناكيا بيوتيك - وهو اسم مرادف للجودة والسلامة والابتكار في التحصين. معا ، دعونا نبني عالما أكثر صحة. راسلنا عبر البريد الإلكتروني على اتصل بنا وحدد "تطوير الأعمال - البيولوجيا واللقاحات" حول باناكيا بيوتيك باناكيا بيوتيك ليميتد هي شركة رائدة في مجال الأدوية والتكنولوجيا الحيوية تتمتع بقدرات بحثية وتصنيعية وتسويقية راسخة. كانت شركة باناكيا بيوتيك فارما ليميتد المملوكة بالكامل لشركة باناكيا بيوتيك رائدة في تطوير لقاحات مبتكرة كاملة السائل يمكن تخزينها في درجة حرارة 2-8 درجات مئوية. أطلقت باناكيا بيوتيك أيضا أول لقاح سداسي التكافؤ سداسي التكافؤ قائم على wP-IPV (DTwP-HepB-Hib-IPV) في العالم في الهند في مارس 2017. لقد وفرنا أكثر من 200 مليون جرعة من اللقاحات المركبة السائلة بالكامل في جميع أنحاء العالم. اللقاحات الرئيسية الأخرى في المحفظة هي لقاح إيسيفيف-TT (DTwP-HepB-Hib) و عصيفور -TT (DTwP-Hib) واللقاح رباعي التكافؤ القائم على IPV - عصيفور-Pol (DTwP-IPV) ولقاح شلل الأطفال الفموي ثنائي التكافؤ (النوع 1 والنوع 3). لقاحات باناكيا بيوتيك الجديدة قيد الإعداد هي لقاح المكورات الرئوية المتقارن - نيوكو فاك-11 و نيوكو فاك-13 ولقاح حمى الضنك المرشح رباعي التكافؤ المؤتلف - دينجي آل وأول لقاح Td خال من الثيومرسال في الهند (الكزاز والدفتيريا). للاستفسارات عن وسائل الإعلام، يرجى الاتصال ب: السيد ب. د. كاران نائب الرئيس الأول - تطوير الأعمال وشؤون الشركات هاتف: +91-11-41679000 تحويلة 1406، 41578080 (مباشر) الهاتف المحمول: +91 9312693040 ، +91 9810500539 البريد الإلكتروني: pdkaran@panaceabiotec.com السيدة جيتانجالي غروفر مدير أول - الاتصالات المؤسسية هاتف: +91-11-41679000 تحويلة 1414 جوال: +91 99100 32288 البريد الإلكتروني: geetanjaligrover@panaceabiotec.com ‍

title: Our Privacy Policy | Panacea Biotec
body: Our Privacy Policy | Panacea Biotec English Global Our Privacy Policy By entering this website, you consent to the terms of this Privacy Policy. By submitting your Information to Panacea Biotec Limited (“Panacea Biotec”), you will be treated as having given your consent for processing your information in a manner provided in this policy. Panacea Biotec respects the privacy of individual/visitor and is committed to take reasonable precautions to protect Personal information and `Sensitive Personal Data or Information’ (“SPDI”) (and together “Information”) of visitors of this Panacea Biotec website and comply with all legal, regulatory and/or contractual obligations related to data privacy. This policy covers the processing, storage and access to Information as required under lawful and/or contractual activities with Panacea Biotec or otherwise required in the normal course of business. It describes Panacea Biotec’s policies and procedures on the collection, usage and disclosure of Information provided/received by natural persons and meets the requirements established under: The Information Technology Act, 2000 – Section 43A; and The Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Information) Rules, 2011. Panacea Biotec has adopted the “Privacy by Default” principles in its approach to data privacy i.e. privacy of data and information is upheld first by default. This policy applies to Information collected and processed by Panacea Biotec consisting of following: SPDI, which is such personal information that is collected, received, stored, transmitted or processed by Panacea Biotec, consisting of: Password; Financial information such as bank account or credit card or debit card or other payment instrument details; Physical, physiological and mental health condition; Sexual orientation; Medical records and history; Biometric information; Any detail relating to the above personal information categories as provided to Panacea Biotec for providing service; and Any of the personal information received by Panacea Biotec for processing, stored or processed under lawful contract or otherwise. Personal information which is information related to a visitor, or a combination of pieces of information that could reasonably allow him to be identified. Personal information may consist of full name, personal contact numbers, residential address, email address, gender or date of birth. Please note that any information that is freely available or accessible in public domain or furnished under the Right to Information Act, 2005 or any other law for the time being in force shall not be regarded as SPDI. Panacea Biotec shall collect and use Information for legitimate business purposes in order: that a visitor may download information, products and take advantage of certain other features of Panacea Biotec's website; to provide information or interactive services through this website, to the visitor’s e-mail address or, where the visitor wishes it to be sent by post, to the visitor’s postal address; to seek the visitor’s feedback or to contact the visitor in relation to the services offered on Panacea Biotec’s website; to process orders or applications submitted by the visitor; to administer or otherwise carry out Panacea Biotec’s obligations in relation to any agreement that the visitor may have with Panacea Biotec; to anticipate and resolve problems with any goods or services supplied to the visitor; to create products or services that may meet the visitor’s needs; or to process and respond to requests, improve Panacea Biotec’s operations, and communicate with visitor/s about Panacea Biotec’s products, services and businesses. Panacea Biotec shall collect only minimum Information required to meet the purposes mentioned in this policy. Neither Panacea Biotec nor its representatives shall be responsible for the authenticity of such Information provided by the visitor/s. As normal business practice, Panacea Biotec may collect Information in order to enable the secure online authentication, interaction and transaction with natural persons. This may include the installation of cookies and the collection of other session data.

Learn more Sustainability Sustainability Environmental Social Governance Latest News Sustainability Reports Careers What We Value PROUD Life Meet our people Experienced Professionals Employee Stories Worldwide Join us Job Opportunity Talent Pool Investors Corporate Governance Financial Reports Announcements & Circulars Stock Information Investor Events Calendar Investor Day Presentations & Webcasts Investors Contact News & Resources Press Releases Knowledge Center Events Press Releases Press Releases 2026 WuXi Biologics’ MFG8 Drug Substance Facility Secures FDA PLI Approval, Advancing Commercial Supply of a Potential Blockbuster Autoimmune Therapy News July 9, 2026 Share WuXi Biologics’ MFG8 Drug Substance Facility Secures FDA PLI Approval, Advancing Commercial Supply of a Potential Blockbuster Autoimmune Therapy Hebei, China, July 9, 2026 – WuXi Biologics (2269.HK), a leading global Contract Research, Development and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO), announced that its MFG8 drug substance manufacturing facility located in Hebei has successfully passed the Pre-License Inspection (PLI) by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA), supporting commercial manufacturing for a potential blockbuster autoimmune therapy. The seven-day FDA inspection conducted by three inspectors covered MFG8’s quality management system and drug substance manufacturing processes. Passing this inspection further reinforces WuXi Biologics’ outstanding regulatory compliance track record and demonstrates the company’s robust and reliable quality system, proven GMP execution excellence, and integrated capabilities to support reliable global commercial manufacturing. MFG8 is an important part of WuXi Biologics’ global manufacturing network. Equipped with twelve 4,000L single-use bioreactors, the facility leverages WuXi Biologics’ distinctive “scale-out” strategy to offer flexible commercial manufacturing at scales ranging from 4,000L to 20,000L. In addition, MFG8 incorporates the latest practices in sustainable construction and applies state-of-the-art technologies, including digital platforms and the rooftop photovoltaic system, to advance carbon reduction, resource reuse, and recycling. Dr. Chris Chen, CEO of WuXi Biologics, commented: “MFG8’s successful FDA Pre-License Inspection pass is a strong testament to WuXi Biologics’ commitment to global quality and compliance standards. This PLI pass reflects our sustained investment in a world-class quality system and our proven capability to support partners in advancing global commercial manufacturing. We are pleased to help bring this potential blockbuster autoimmune therapy to patients through our high-quality manufacturing capabilities. Moving forward, WuXi Biologics will continue to empower global partners with a reliable quality system and accelerate the delivery of innovative biologics to more patients worldwide.” WuXi Biologics has consistently demonstrated a proven track record of adherence to the industry’s rigorous quality standards. As of the end of 2025, it has successfully passed 46 regulatory inspections, including 22 conducted by the FDA and EMA, and secured 136 facility license approvals. The company also holds an industry-leading record, achieving a 100% pass rate for FDA Pre-License Inspection (PLI). In addition, WuXi Biologics has passed more than 1,800 GMP quality audits by global clients, including over 230 audits by EU Qualified Persons. Currently, the company operates 25 drug substance facilities and 18 drug product facilities within its global network. Its world-class quality and compliance capabilities underpin long-standing trust from clients worldwide. About WuXi Biologics WuXi Biologics (stock code: 2269.HK) is a leading global Contract Research, Development and Manufacturing Organization (CRDMO) offering end-to-end solutions that enable partners to discover, develop and manufacture biologics — from concept to commercialization — for the benefit of patients worldwide*. With over 13,000 employees in China, the United States, Ireland, Germany, and Singapore — including experts and scientists in biologics R&D and manufacturing, technology innovation, and operational excellence — WuXi Biologics leverages its technologies and expertise to deliver efficient, cost-effective, and scalable biologics solutions tailored to meet clients’needs. By embedding digital capability and infrastructure across the full biopharmaceutical value chain, the company turns data, computation, and prediction into transparent client experience, faster development, intelligent operations, and more efficient manufacturing. As of April 30, 2026, WuXi Biologics is supporting 982 integrated client projects, including 78 in Phase III and 25 in commercial manufacturing, with complex modalities representing more than half of the entire project portfolio. WuXi Biologics regards sustainability as the cornerstone of long-term business growth. The company continuously drives technology innovations to offer advanced end-to-end Green CRDMO solutions for its global partners while demonstrating exemplary Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) practices. Committed to creating shared value, it collaborates with all stakeholders to foster positive social and environmental impacts, and promote responsible practices that empower the entire value chain. title: California Compliance Declaration Comprehensive Compliance Program | Foundation Medicine
body: California Compliance Declaration Comprehense Compliance Program Original Post Date: January 2020 Last Modified: September 2025 Introduction Foundation Medicine, Inc. seeks to help patients and providers navigate the complex landscape of cancer care and provide genomic insights to help guide informed decisions.  Our mission at Foundation Medicine is to bring deep molecular information to the point of care for every patient living with advanced cancer. Foundation Medicine’s Code of Conduct (“Code of Conduct”) reflects our commitment to conducting business with high standards of ethical behavior.  The Code of Conduct is applicable to all employees of Foundation Medicine.  All directors, officers and employees are expected to act with integrity and to make ethical decisions consistent with the Code of Conduct. Foundation Medicine is committed to establishing and maintaining an effective compliance and ethics program that promotes conducting business with integrity and complying with the laws applicable to Foundation Medicine and its operations.  Our compliance and ethics program is based on the elements described in the "Compliance Program Guidance for Pharmaceutical Manufacturers" issued by the Office of Inspector General of the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (the "OIG Guidance") and the "Code of Ethics on Interactions with Healthcare Professionals" issued by the Advanced Medical Technology Association (“AdvaMed Code”). Foundation Medicine’s compliance and ethics program is designed, implemented and operated with the goal of preventing, detecting and responding to potential or actual instances of non-compliance.  All Foundation Medicine employees are required to comply with the Code of Conduct, company policies, and applicable laws. However, as acknowledged by the OIG Guidance, the implementation of a comprehensive compliance program does not guarantee that there will be no misconduct.  If Foundation Medicine becomes aware of potential violations of law, the Code of Conduct or company policy, the matters are investigated.  As appropriate, disciplinary and corrective actions are implemented to prevent future violations.  Additionally, Foundation Medicine continuously assesses the effectiveness of its compliance program to enable it to implement necessary adjustments or refinements to the program. Following is an overview of Foundation Medicine’s comprehensive compliance and ethics program which is reviewed and updated periodically to meet changing regulatory, legal and compliance requirements. Leadership and Oversight Foundation Medicine has a Chief Compliance Officer who is responsible for developing, operating, and monitoring the compliance and ethics program. The Compliance Officer reports directly to the General Counsel.  Foundation Medicine’s Compliance Officer has the ability to effectuate change within the organization and to exercise independent judgment. Foundation Medicine has established a Compliance Committee designed to provide leadership and support for the company’s compliance and ethics program, assist Foundation Medicine’s leadership team in managing the compliance and ethics program, and to provide assistance and guidance in assessing and verifying the effectiveness of the compliance and ethics program to promote our ethical business culture and compliant operating environment.  The members of the Compliance Committee are senior leaders from multiple business functions. The Compliance Committee meets on a regular basis to monitor Foundation Medicine’s comprehensive compliance and ethics program. Written Standards In addition to the Code of Conduct, Foundation Medicine has developed and implemented compliance policies and procedures to help ensure compliance with applicable laws and to support ethical decision-making. These policies and procedures have been developed under the direction and supervision of the Chief Compliance Officer and Compliance Committee.  Foundation Medicine’s written standards address the key areas of potential risk for medical device manufacturers identified in the OIG Guidance.  All Foundation Medicine employees and representatives are required to adhere to the company’s policies and procedures. Foundation Medicine’s relationships with healthcare professionals are intended to benefit patients and to enhance the practice of medicine.  Informational presentations and discussions by company representatives and others speaking on behalf of Foundation Medicine provide valuable scientific and educational benefits.  In connection with such presentations or discussions, Foundation Medicine may offer occasional meals and items designed primarily for the education of patients and healthcare professionals in accordance with the AdvaMed Code. With respect to business activities in California, Foundation Medicine has established "a specific annual dollar limit on educational items and promotional activities Foundation Medicine may give or otherwise provide to an individual medical or healthcare professional."  Foundation Medicine has established an annual maximum dollar limit of $2,000, effective as of October 1, 2025.  Foundation Medicine will evaluate this limit on an annual basis and make any necessary adjustments consistent with any operational or practical issues related to compliance with the statute.  The annual limit does not include expenditures for the following: Financial support for continuing medical education programs. Financial support for health educational scholarships. Payments for legitimate professional services, and any meals or expenses associated with the provision of such services. Patient educational materials provided to patients by their physician with the purpose of educating the patient or enhancing the patient’s understanding or management of the condition. Education and Training All Foundation Medicine employees in the U.S. receive appropriate compliance training which includes education on the OIG Guidance, the AdvaMed Code, anti-kickback laws and anticorruption, the federal False Claims Act, and requirements related to product promotion, privacy, conflicts of interest, and other applicable federal, state, and industry rules and guidelines.   Foundation Medicine regularly reviews and revises its compliance training and seeks to identify new areas of training that may be needed to educate employees on compliance matters and the laws and requirements applicable to Foundation Medicine. Internal Lines of Communication Foundation Medicine encourages open communication and maintains an open reporting environment.  The company has adopted and reinforces its policy against retaliation.  Foundation Medicine’s Code of Conduct and policies require employees to report any actual or suspected violations of the Code of Conduct, company policies or applicable law.  Each reported matter is appropriately investigated and addressed. Employees can raise concerns or report potential misconduct in a number of ways including managers and business leaders; the Legal and Compliance Department or the People Team; or the third-party operated hotline. Employees may raise concerns without fear of retaliation.  In addition, Foundation Medicine’s Compliance team maintains an internal website on which compliance-related policies, guidance and information can be found. Auditing and Monitoring Foundation Medicine’s comprehensive compliance and ethics program includes an auditing and monitoring plan to assess whether policies and procedures which address compliance risk areas have been implemented and communicated and are followed. The areas for monitoring and auditing are reviewed and updated to reflect evolving compliance concerns, new regulatory requirements, changes in business practices, and other considerations. The results of auditing and monitoring activities are considered in adapting and improving existing compliance policies, procedures and training. Responding to Potential Violations Employees are required to adhere to the Code of Conduct and company policies.  Any violations can subject an employee to serious disciplinary measures, including possible termination of employment.  Although the disciplinary and corrective actions for each situation are determined on a case-by-case basis, Foundation Medicine seeks to ensure consistent and appropriate disciplinary and corrective actions are taken in response to violations. Corrective Action Foundation Medicine conducts investigations of potential violations of the Code of Conduct and company policies in accordance with its written investigations and corrective action protocol to ensure timely, complete, and objective investigations.  In accordance with the OIG Guidance, the exact nature and level or thoroughness of the internal investigation will vary according to the circumstances.  Once an internal investigation is completed, corrective action and preventative measures are determined and implemented as appropriate. This description is effective as of October 1, 2025. Foundation Medicine will assess its compliance program at least annually, for the purpose of declaring compliance with California Health and Safety Codes §§ 119400-119402. California Declaration of Compliance Foundation Medicine, Inc. is committed to establishing and maintaining an effective compliance and ethics program that promotes conducting business with integrity and complying with the laws applicable to Foundation Medicine and its operations.  Based on a good faith understanding of the requirements of Section 119402 of the California Health & Safety Code, Foundation Medicine hereby declares that, to the best of its knowledge, as of October 1, 2025, Foundation Medicine is in material compliance with its comprehensive compliance and ethics program and the requirements of the California Health & Safety Code §§ 119400-119402. It is Foundation Medicine’s expectation that all employees and representatives comply with its compliance and ethics program and all policies that support this program.  Foundation Medicine is committed to assessing ongoing compliance with its compliance program, which is designed to prevent, detect and respond to potential or actual instances of non-compliance. A copy of this Declaration may be obtained by contacting Foundation Medicine at (888) 988-3639. Need More Details? Our client services team is here to help, Monday through Friday 8AM – 8PM EST. Contact us

title: Pathology at Foundation Medicine | Foundation Medicine
body: Pathology Pathology at Foundation Medicine Every Foundation Medicine test is reviewed and analyzed by our Pathology Department, a world-class team of passionate, experienced, board-certified experts dedicated to diagnostic excellence. Contact Our Team Explore Our Research Papers Get Expert Support Experience, Reach, and Expertise Over 1.5 million patient CGP reports delivered (both adult and pediatric) Locations Our Labs Boston Seaport, MA. Research Triangle, NC. Penzberg, Germany Expertise Anatomic, Clinical, and Molecular Pathology including training at NCCN designated cancer centers Our Pathology Labs Every test sent to a Foundation Medicine lab receives expert handling and review, including: Tissue Specimen Tissue specimen reviewed under microscope by an anatomic pathologist with molecular expertise prior to testing Pathologist Review Pathologist review of test requisition form, pathology report, and any clinical notes, radiology reports, and/or laboratory results to confirm diagnosis and assign a disease ontology for clinical reporting Sample Optimization Sample optimization for successful sequencing, including determining tissue input requirements and whether to perform microdissection High-Quality Tumor Analysis Our labs employ cutting-edge microdissection techniques like precision needle-punch enrichment and microscope-guided razor blade enrichment. Using these techniques on small or low purity samples increases tumor nuclei cellularity and nucleic acid yield, improving the quality of NGS results. Take a Tour of Our Pathology Labs Accessioning and Path Review Phase 1 Watch Video Library Construction  and Hybrid Capture Phase 2 Watch Video Computational Analysis and Reporting Phase 3 Watch Video Interpretation, Reporting, and Consultation Request One-on-One Consultation Expert Review After sequencing, every sample is individually reviewed by our pathologists, who integrate clinical, radiologic, histomorphologic, and immunophenotypic data with the genomic data to deliver comprehensive reports focused on diagnosis, prognosis, and targeted therapies. Cancer of Unknown Primary Sevice We place special emphasis on providing discrete diagnoses for difficult differentials and cancers of uncertain primary origin, working in collaboration with submitting surgical pathologists and oncologists. IHC Testing by Tumor Type This is a pathologist-led immunohistochemistry (IHC) selection service at Foundation Medicine. This single-click service bundles the appropriate IHC tests together automatically based on each patient’s tumor type, streamlining the ordering process. This can include identified genomic alterations and their potential diagnostic significance, as well as implications of the findings for prognosis and treatment, including targeted therapies and clinical trials.
